title: Sort users alphabetically
input: sort the user list on the admin page by last_name ascending, then first_name ascending. the sort should happen server-side before returning results.

requiredConstraints: sort the user list on the admin page by last_name ascending, then first_name ascending. the sort should happen server-side before returning results.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add new storage systems or background jobs while addressing “Sort users alphabetically”.
